metadata.description: Accelerated revision modules covering General Knowledge, Hindi, Maths, Mental Ability, Reasoning and Aptitude.

qas.q: Sindhu Ghati Sabhyata ka bandargah kaun sa tha? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Lothal = dockyard yaad rakho; port city pooche to seedha Lothal.

qas.q: Rigveda mein kis nadi ka sabse adhik ullekh milta hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Saraswati nadi ka sabse adhik ullekh milta hai.
qas.hack: Rigveda + Saraswati combo bahut common hai.

qas.q: Buddha ko gyan prapti kahan hui thi? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Bodh Gaya, Bihar mein gyan prapti hui thi.
qas.hack: Janm = Lumbini, Gyan = Bodh Gaya, Pratham updesh = Sarnath, Mahaparinirvan = Kushinagar.

qas.q: Mahavir Swami Jain dharm ke kaun se Tirthankar the? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: Jainism mein 24 Tirthankar, last = Mahavir.

qas.q: Maurya vansh ka sansthapak kaun tha? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Chandragupta Maurya Maurya vansh ka sansthapak tha.
qas.hack: Maurya start = Chandragupta, peak fame = Ashoka.

qas.q: Kalinga yudh ke baad kis shasak ne Bauddh dharm apnaya? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Samrat Ashoka ne Bauddh dharm apnaya.
qas.hack: Kalinga war ka direct result = Ashoka ka Dhamma.

qas.q: Gupta kaal ko kis naam se jana jata hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Gupta kaal ko Bharat ka Swarn Yug kaha jata hai.
qas.hack: Gupta = Golden Age; arts, science, literature sab top par.

qas.q: Delhi Sultanat ka pratham shasak kaun mana jata hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Qutubuddin Aibak ko pratham shasak mana jata hai.
qas.hack: Slave dynasty start = Qutubuddin Aibak.

qas.q: Qutub Minar ka nirmaan kisne prarambh karwaya tha? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Qutubuddin Aibak ne iska nirmaan shuru karwaya tha.
qas.hack: Qutub Minar naam se hi Qutubuddin yaad karo.

qas.q: Mughal samrajya ka sansthapak kaun tha? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Babur Mughal samrajya ka sansthapak tha.
qas.hack: 1526 Panipat 1 = Babur entry.

qas.q: Akbar ka rajsva mantri kaun tha? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Raja Todar Mal Akbar ka rajsva mantri tha.
qas.hack: Todar Mal = revenue system specialist.

qas.q: Taj Mahal kisne banwaya? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: Taj Mahal = Shahjahan + Mumtaz memory.

qas.q: Bhakti aandolan ke prasiddh sant Kabir kis bhasha mein dohe likhte the? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Kabir ne sadhukkadi/mixed lokbhasha mein dohe likhe.
qas.hack: Kabir = saral lokbhasha, seedha message.

qas.q: Panipat ki pahli ladai kis-kis ke beech hui thi? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Babur aur Ibrahim Lodi ke beech hui thi.
qas.hack: 1526 = Babur vs Lodi, exam evergreen fact.

qas.q: 1857 ki kranti ka prarambh kahan se hua tha? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Meerut se iska prarambh hua tha.
qas.hack: 1857 = Meerut trigger, Delhi spread.

qas.q: Indian National Congress ki sthapna kab hui thi? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: 1885 mein INC ki sthapna hui thi.
qas.hack: INC = 1885, founder line mein A.O. Hume yaad rakho.

qas.q: Jallianwala Bagh hatyakand kab hua tha? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Baisakhi ke din = 13 April 1919.

qas.q: Asahyog Aandolan kis varsh shuru hua tha? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: 1920 mein Asahyog Aandolan shuru hua tha.
qas.hack: 1920 Non-Cooperation, 1930 Dandi, 1942 Quit India.

qas.q: Dandi Yatra kis se sambandhit thi? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Namak kanoon todne se sambandhit thi.
qas.hack: Dandi March = Salt Satyagraha.

qas.q: Quit India Movement kis varsh shuru hua? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: 1942 mein Quit India Movement shuru hua.
qas.hack: 1942 = Bharat Chhodo Andolan.

qas.q: Bhagat Singh, Rajguru aur Sukhdev ko kab phansi di gayi? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: 23 March = Shaheed Diwas.

qas.q: Bharat ka samvidhan lagu hone se pehle Bharat kab swatantra hua? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: 15 Aug = Azadi, 26 Jan = Ganatantra.

qas.q: Bharat ki sabse lambi nadi kaun si hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Ganga Bharat ki sabse lambi nadi mani jati hai.
qas.hack: India longest river = Ganga; peninsula longest = Godavari.

qas.q: Bharat ka sabse uncha shikhar kaun sa hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Kanchanjanga Bharat ka sabse uncha shikhar hai.
qas.hack: India mein highest = Kanchenjunga, world = Everest.

qas.q: Uttar Pradesh ki rajdhani kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Lucknow Uttar Pradesh ki rajdhani hai.
qas.hack: UP GK ka sabse basic aur most repeated fact.

qas.q: Thar marusthal Bharat ke kis rajya mein sthit hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Ye mukhyata Rajasthan mein sthit hai.
qas.hack: Thar = Rajasthan = Great Indian Desert.

qas.q: Bharat ka sabse bada rajya kshetrafal ke anusar kaun sa hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Area biggest = Rajasthan, population biggest = UP.

qas.q: Bharat ka sabse adhik aabadi wala rajya kaun sa hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Uttar Pradesh sabse adhik aabadi wala rajya hai.
qas.hack: UP = population king; exam mein baar-baar poocha jata hai.

qas.q: Bharat ke kitne padosi desh hain? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Aam tor par 7 sthaliye padosi desh bataye jate hain; exam options ke hisab se answer dena hota hai.
qas.hack: Pakistan, China, Nepal, Bhutan, Bangladesh, Myanmar, Afghanistan; Sri Lanka samudri padosi hai.

qas.q: Himalaya ki sabse uttari shreni kaun si hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Order yaad rakho: Himadri, Himachal, Shivalik.

qas.q: Brahmaputra nadi Tibet mein kis naam se jani jati hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Tibet mein ise Tsangpo kaha jata hai.
qas.hack: Tsangpo -> Brahmaputra -> Jamuna, teen naam ek nadi.

qas.q: Dakshin-Pashchim monsoon Bharat mein sabse pehle kis rajya mein pravesh karta hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Kerala mein sabse pehle pravesh karta hai.
qas.hack: Monsoon entry gate = Kerala.

qas.q: Narmada aur Tapi kis disha mein behne wali nadiyan hain? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Ye pashchim ki aur behne wali nadiyan hain.
qas.hack: West flowing famous pair = Narmada + Tapi.

qas.q: Himalaya aur Vindhyachal ke beech ka maidan kis naam se jana jata hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Isse Uttar Bharat ka maidan ya Indo-Gangetic plain se joda jata hai, option ke hisab se chunna hota hai.
qas.hack: Plains related question mein Ganga-Yamuna plain ya Northern plain options dekhna.

qas.q: Bharatiya Samvidhan kab lagu hua? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Adopt = 26 Nov 1949, Enforce = 26 Jan 1950.

qas.q: Samvidhan ka kaunsa anuchhed shabd shiksha ke adhikar se sambandhit hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Anuchhed 21A shiksha ke adhikar se sambandhit hai.
qas.hack: 21A = 6 se 14 saal tak free aur compulsory education.

qas.q: Mool Adhikar Samvidhan ke kis bhaag mein diye gaye hain? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Part III mein Mool Adhikar diye gaye hain.
qas.hack: Part 3 = Fundamental Rights, Part 4 = DPSP.

qas.q: Rajya ke Neeti Nirdeshak Tatva kis bhaag mein hain? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Part IV mein diye gaye hain.
qas.hack: FR court enforceable, DPSP non-justiciable.

qas.q: Mool Kartavya kis anuchhed mein diye gaye hain? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: 51A = Fundamental Duties, total 11.

qas.q: Rashtriya Aapatkal kis anuchhed ke antargat lagayi jati hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: 352 National, 356 President Rule, 360 Financial.

qas.q: Rajya Sabha ke sadasyon ki adhiktam sankhya kitni hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Rajya Sabha ki adhiktam sankhya 250 hai.
qas.hack: 238 elected + 12 nominated = 250 max.

qas.q: Supreme Court ke nyayadhishon ki sevanivriti ayu kitni hoti hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: SC = 65, HC = 62. Ye pair yaad rakho.

qas.q: Prakash sansleshan ke dauran kaunsi gas nikalti hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Plants CO2 lete hain, O2 chhodte hain.

qas.q: Pani ka rasayanik sutra kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: 2 Hydrogen + 1 Oxygen = H2O.

qas.q: Vitamin C ki kami se kaunsa rog hota hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Vitamin C = Scurvy, Vitamin D = Rickets.

qas.q: DNA ka poora naam kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: DNA = genetic code store karta hai.

qas.q: Newton ka doosra niyam kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Bal = dravyamaan guna tvaran, yani F = ma.
qas.hack: 2nd law mein formula direct poocha jata hai.

qas.q: Dhavni ki gati sabse adhik kis madhyam mein hoti hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Thos madhyam mein sabse adhik hoti hai.
qas.hack: Solid > Liquid > Gas.

qas.q: Manav sharir ki sabse badi granthi kaun si hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Yakrit ya liver sabse badi granthi hai.
qas.hack: Largest gland = liver, largest organ = skin.

qas.q: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana kis varsh shuru hui? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Jan Dhan = bank account + financial inclusion.

qas.q: Swachh Bharat Mission kab prarambh hua? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Gandhi Jayanti par launch hua tha.

qas.q: Ayushman Bharat yojana mein prati parivar kitne rupaye tak ka health cover diya jata hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: 5 lakh rupaye tak ka cover diya jata hai.
qas.hack: Ayushman Bharat = 5 lakh health insurance.

qas.q: PM Awas Yojana ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: Logon ko pakka ghar uplabdh karana iska mukhya uddeshya hai.
qas.hack: Housing scheme pooche to pakka ghar yaad rakho.

qas.q: 24 January ko Uttar Pradesh mein kaunsa divas manaya jata hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: Uttar Pradesh Sthapana Diwas manaya jata hai.
qas.hack: UP special date = 24 Jan.

qas.q: ‘Wings of Fire’ pustak ke lekhak kaun hain? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam iske lekhak hain.
qas.hack: Kalam books trio: Wings of Fire, Ignited Minds, India 2020.

qas.q: Phishing ka sambandh kis se hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: Fake email ya website ke through personal data churane se sambandh hai.
qas.hack: Phishing = data pakadne ki chal; OTP kabhi share mat karo.

qas.q: National Cyber Crime Helpline number kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Cyber fraud yaad = 1930 seedha dimag mein rakho.

qas.q: Information Technology Act Bharat mein kis varsh lagu hua? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: IT Act 2000 = digital kanoon ki base line.

qas.q: Online financial fraud report karne ke liye rashtriya portal kaun sa hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: cybercrime.gov.in portal par report ki ja sakti hai.
qas.hack: Portal + helpline pair yaad rakho: cybercrime.gov.in + 1930.

qas.q: 'विद्यालय' shabd mein kaun si sandhi hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Ye swar sandhi ka udaharan hai.
qas.hack: Vidya + alaya type words mein swar sandhi check karo.

qas.q: 'देवेश' ka sandhi-vicched kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Dev + ईश ya Dev + Ish hoga.
qas.hack: Esh/ish wale shabdon mein swar sandhi ka pattern dekhna.

qas.q: 'सदैव' mein kaun si sandhi hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: Isme vriddhi swar sandhi hoti hai.
qas.hack: A + e/ai wale pattern ko vriddhi se jodo.

qas.q: 'लोकोपकार' ka sandhi-vicched kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: O ya au sunai de to gun/vriddhi possibilities check karo.

qas.q: 'महोत्सव' ka sandhi-vicched kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Maha + u se maho type sound aaye to gun sandhi yaad karo.

qas.q: 'राजा-रानी' mein kaun sa samas hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Jahan dono shabd barabar important hon, wahan dvandva.

qas.q: 'नीलकमल' mein kaun sa samas hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: Visheshan + visheshya = karmadharaya.

qas.q: 'दशानन' kis samas ka udaharan hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: Ye bahuvrihi samas ka udaharan hai.
qas.hack: Jo kisi teesre vyakti ko bataye, wo bahuvrihi.

qas.q: 'त्रिलोकी' mein kaun sa samas hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Number + noun wale samas mein dvigu dhundo.

qas.q: 'यथाशक्ति' mein kaun sa samas hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Yatha, prati, upa jaise aarambh wale words mein avyayibhav common hota hai.

qas.q: 'अग्नि' ka tadbhav roop kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Agni -> aag bahut famous pair hai.

qas.q: 'दुग्ध' ka tadbhav kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: Dugdh se doodh direct pair yaad rakho.

qas.q: 'नख' ka tadbhav roop kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Tatsam short, tadbhav bolchal wala hota hai.

qas.q: 'कर्म' ka tadbhav roop kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Karm -> kaam pair exam favourite hai.

qas.q: 'हस्त' ka tadbhav roop kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Hasta/hand related words mein haath yaad rakho.

qas.q: 'सूर्य' ka paryayvachi kaun sa hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Ravi, Bhaskar, Aditya jaise shabd iske paryayvachi hain.
qas.hack: Surya = Ravi ya Bhaskar option sabse common.

qas.q: 'जल' ka paryayvachi kaun sa hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Neer, ambu, toya, vari sab jal ke paryayvachi hain.
qas.hack: Jal ke rare options jaise ambu, vari pe focus karo.

qas.q: 'उदय' ka vilom kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Surya related pair: uday-ast.

qas.q: 'सुख' ka vilom kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Simple vilom mein trap kam hota hai, speed se karo.

qas.q: 'अंधकार' ka paryayvachi ya vilom sambandhi prashn mein sahi jod kaun sa hoga? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Darkness-light pair direct yaad rakho.

qas.q: 'आंखें दिखाना' muhavare ka arth kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Iska arth dhamkana ya daraana hota hai.
qas.hack: Muhavare mein literal meaning mat lagao.

qas.q: 'नाक कटना' muhavare ka sahi arth kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Iska arth apmaan hona hota hai.
qas.hack: Naak = samman; naak katna = badnami.

qas.q: 'अंधेर नगरी चौपट राजा' lokokti ka arth kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: Jahan vyavastha na ho aur shasan bekaar ho, us arth mein use hoti hai.
qas.hack: Law-order context wali lokokti yaad rakho.

qas.q: 'आम के आम गुठलियों के दाम' lokokti ka arth kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: Ek kaam se do fayde milna.
qas.hack: Double benefit wali lokokti hai.

qas.q: 'हाथ मलना' muhavare ka arth kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Action based muhavare mein emotional meaning nikalta hai.

qas.q: Nimn me se shuddh shabd kaun sa hai? 'दुर्गति/dugati' type prashn [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Aise prashn mein sahi varnavinyas wala shabd chunna hota hai; common correct form 'durgati' hota hai.
qas.hack: Spelling questions mein matra aur half-letter dhyan se dekho.

qas.q: Vakya shuddhi ke anusaar 'राम ने खाना खाई' ka shuddh roop kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Shuddh roop hoga 'Ram ne khana khaya'.
qas.hack: Ling aur kriya ka milan sabse common error hai.

qas.q: 'निरोपित/निरूपित' me se shuddh shabd kaun sa hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Ru, ri, re ke variant options mein pronunciation se confuse mat ho.

qas.q: 'जो सब कुछ जानता हो' ke liye ek shabd kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: One-word substitution mein definition ko key word se pakdo.

qas.q: 'जो कभी न मरे' ke liye ek shabd kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: A- prefix se negative meaning wale shabd yaad rakho.

qas.q: दो संख्याओं का HCF 12 और LCM 336 है। यदि एक संख्या 84 hai, to doosri sankhya kya hogi? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Formula yaad: do numbers ka product = HCF × LCM.

qas.q: 440 aur 660 ka HCF kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: Badi common divisibility based calculation hai.

qas.q: Sabse chhoti woh sankhya kaun si hai jo 12, 15 aur 20 se poori bhag jaye? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: LCM wale prashn mein prime factorization fastest hota hai.

qas.q: 1 se 100 ke beech kitni prime sankhyayen hoti hain? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: 1 prime nahi hota, 2 eklauta even prime hai.

qas.q: Nimn me se kaun composite sankhya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: 4, 6, 8, 9 jaise numbers composite hote hain; option ke hisab se answer choose hota hai.
qas.hack: Prime = sirf 2 factors; composite = 2 se zyada factors.

qas.q: Ek sankhya ka 20% = 80 hai, sankhya kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: 20% diya ho to 5 se multiply kar do.

qas.q: Kisi vastu ka moolya 25% badhkar 500 ho gaya. Purana moolya kya tha? [UP Police Constable 2019]
Kisi kaksha me 40 vidyarthi hain, jinme 60% ladke hain. Ladkiyon ki sankhya kitni hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: 60% boys matlab 40% girls.

qas.q: 500 ka 12% kitna hota hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: 10% + 2% trick se turant nikalo.

qas.q: Kisi sankhya me 10% vriddhi ke baad 220 hota hai, mool sankhya kya thi? [UP Police Constable 2018]
Ek vastu 20% labh par 600 rupaye me bechi gayi. Iska kray moolya kya tha? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: SP = 120% of CP, isliye CP = 600/1.2.

qas.q: Koi vyakti vastu ko 12% haani par 1452 rupaye me bechta hai. Kray moolya kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: Loss case me SP = 88% of CP.

qas.q: Ek vastu 29% labh par 28380 me bechi gayi. Yadi wahi vastu 24090 me bechi jaye to labh pratishat kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Pehle CP nikalo, phir naya profit% nikaal do.

qas.q: 600 rupaye ki vastu ka 3/4 bhaag 10% labh par aur 1/4 bhaag 20% haani par becha gaya. Kul labh/haani kya hogi? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Part-wise SP jodo, phir total CP se compare karo.

qas.q: Discount aur profit me antar kis aadhar par hota hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Discount MRP par hota hai aur profit/loss CP par nikalta hai.
qas.hack: MP, SP, CP teenon ko alag rakho warna galti pakki.

qas.q: 1000 rupaye par 10% dar se 2 varsh ka chakravriddhi byaaj kitna hoga? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: A = P(1+r/100)^n se direct karo.

qas.q: Kisi dhan par 2 varsh ka CI 2000 aur SI 1900 hai. Dono ka antar 100 hai. Ye kis concept se juda prashn hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: Ye 2 saal ke CI-SI difference concept se juda hai.
qas.hack: 2 years me CI-SI = first year interest par extra interest.

qas.q: Saral byaaj ka sutra kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: SI = P × R × T / 100 hota hai.
qas.hack: P, R, T ka full form exam se pehle rat lo.

qas.q: 5000 rupaye par 5% dar se 2 varsh ka saral byaaj kitna hoga? [UP Police Constable 2024]
Saral byaaj aur chakravriddhi byaaj me kaun sa adhik hota hai, ka samay aur dar same ho? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Interest on interest ki wajah se CI hamesha bada ya equal hota hai.

qas.q: Anupat 2:3 me agar pehla pad 40 ho to doosra pad kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Part ki value = 40/2 = 20, dusra = 20×3 = 60.

qas.q: 5 logon ki average age 30 saal hai. Ek aur vyakti 36 saal ka aaye to nayi average kya hogi? [UP Police Constable 2019]
Dono sankhyaon ka anupat 3:4 aur unka LCM 120 hai. Chhoti sankhya kya hogi? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: 3x aur 4x le, LCM = 12x = 120, x = 10, to 3x = 30.

qas.q: Ek class me 40 vidyarthi hain, jinme girls ka anupat 3:5 hai. Ladkiyon ki sankhya kitni hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Total parts = 8, girls = 3/8 × 40 = 15.

qas.q: Average of 8 numbers = 20. Agar ek number 28 ko badal kar 32 kiya jaye to nayi average kya hogi? [UP Police Constable 2018]
A 10 din aur B 15 din me kaam karta hai. Saath me kitne din me karenge? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: LCM method: LCM(10,15)=30, A=3 unit, B=2 unit, total=5 unit/day, 30/5=6.

qas.q: Speed 60 km/h aur time 3 ghante hai. Door kitni hogi? [UP Police Constable 2019]
Koi vyakti 120 km ki doori 4 ghante me pura karta hai. Uski average speed kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
A 8 din me kaam karta hai aur B usse adha kaam 6 din me karta hai. Saath me kitne din me karenge? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: B pura kaam 12 din me karega, to 1/8+1/12 = 5/24, total = 24/5 = 4.8.

qas.q: 60 km/h ki speed se operate hote vyakti ki speed m/s me kya hogi? [UP Police Constable 2018]
Rectangle ki length 10 cm aur breadth 6 cm hai. Area kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2018]
Ek vritta (circle) ka parimiti 44 cm hai. Iska vruh (radius) kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2019]
Cube ka parsh kshetrafal (surface area) 24 cm² hai. Uska ek parsh (side) kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Surface area = 6a² = 24, a² = 4, a = 2.

qas.q: Cylinder ka volume πr²h ke sutr se nikalta hai. Agar r=3, h=5 to volume kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2024]
Samabhuj tribhuj (equilateral triangle) ka prshṅ 12 cm hai. Area kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2018]
2, 5, 10, 17, 26, ? — agya sankhya kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
Coding: MANGO = NBOQP, to APPLE = ? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: Har letter +1 shift: A→B, P→Q, P→Q, L→M, E→F.

qas.q: Blood Relation: A ki biwi ki maa ka pati kaun hoga? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Biwi ki maa = saas, saas ke pati = sasur.

qas.q: Series: 3, 9, 27, 81, ? — next kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
A, B, C, D, E alphabet sequence me agla letter kaun hoga? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Simple alphabetical order.

qas.q: Koi vyakti East ki aur chalta hai, phir apne left me 90° mudta hai. Ab vyakti kis disha me hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Ab vyakti North disha me hai.
qas.hack: East se left = North.

qas.q: A, line me 5th from top aur 8th from bottom hai. Total members kitne honge? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: Formula: 5+8–1 = 12.

qas.q: Direction: Surya pradishat (sunrise) mein kahan se uggta hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Sunrise = East, sunset = West.

qas.q: A, 10th from top aur 15th from bottom hai. Kul vidyarthi kitne hain? [UP Police Constable 2024]
Kisi vyakti ki shadow West mein hai. Surya kis disha me hoga? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Shadow = sun ki opposite disha mein.

qas.q: Doctor : Hospital :: Teacher : ? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Worker : Workplace pattern.

qas.q: Lion, Tiger, Cheetah, Elephant — odd one out kaun hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: Baaki teen sab cat family, elephant alag.

qas.q: Pen : Writer :: Brush : ? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Tool : User pattern.

qas.q: Stipend : Student :: Salary : ? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Payment : Recipient relationship.

qas.q: Gold : Metal :: Rose : ? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Sample : Category pattern.

qas.q: All dogs are animals. All animals are living. Conclusion: All dogs are living — sahi hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: All A→B, All B→C, to All A→C.

qas.q: All cats are black. Some black are dogs. Conclusion: Some cats are dogs — sahi hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: Direct chain nahi ban rahi, conclusion invalid.

qas.q: No apple is orange. All oranges are fruits. Conclusion: No apple is fruit — sahi hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Apple fruit ho sakta hai, orange na ho.

qas.q: All pens are pencils. Some pencils are books. Conclusion: Some pens are books — sahi hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Some wale case me direct jaan nahi pakki hoti.

qas.q: Venn diagram mein 'All A are B' ko kaise dikhaya jata hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: A ki circle B ki circle ke andar dikhti hai.
qas.hack: All = andar, Some = overlap, No = alag.

qas.q: Statement: All students should get free education. Argument: Education is basic right — strong ya weak? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: Logical + factual argument strong hota hai.

qas.q: Circular seating: A, B, C, D, E clockwise. Agar A north pe hai, to C kis disha me hoga? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: Clockwise count: North → East → South (pattern based reasoning).

qas.q: Statement: Smoking is harmful. Argument: Tobacco company profits kam honge — strong ya weak? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: Emotional/secondary argument weak hota hai.

qas.q: Line seating: A, B, C, D, E. A left end, E right end. B, A ke right. C, E ke left. Madhya me kaun hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: Madhya me C ya B ho sakta hai, option ke hisab se resolve hota hai.
qas.hack: Fixed positions pehle, phir relative.

qas.q: Strong argument ki pehchan kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Logical, relevant, factual argument strong hota hai.
qas.hack: Emotional ya opinion-based argument weak.

qas.q: English alphabet me 15th letter kaun hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
BODMAS me 'O' ka kya matlab hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: BODMAS order: Brackets, Of, Division, Multiplication, Addition, Subtraction.

qas.q: MANGO = NBOQP pattern me APPLE = ? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: +1 shift on each letter.

qas.q: Alphabet me 20th letter kaun hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.hack: T = 20, EJOTY trick se yaad.

qas.q: Mathematical expression me brackets pehle kyun todte hain? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: BODMAS rule ke anusar brackets pehle solve hote hain.
qas.hack: Order strict: Brackets of DM AS.

qas.q: Police ka primary duty kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Law aur order maintain karna, crime rokna, public safety ensure karna.
qas.hack: Public trust = police ki pehli zimmedari.

qas.q: FIR kya hoti hai aur kahan darj hoti hai? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.a: FIR = First Information Report, police station mein darj hoti hai.
qas.hack: FIR = CrPC Section 154, free of cost.

qas.q: Arrest karne ke baad 24 ghante mein kya karna padta hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: Magistrate ke samne pesh karna padta hai.
qas.hack: Article 22: 24 ghante me magistrate presentation.

qas.q: Police officer ko public interest mein kya karna chahiye? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: Nishpaksha rahna, rashwat na lena, equal protection dena.
qas.hack: Ethics = impartiality + law-following.

qas.q: Neta case band karne bol raha hai, police kya kare? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Neta ki baat nahi maani jati, case legally proceed karna hai.
qas.hack: Law > Political pressure.

qas.q: Dictionary order: Bat, Ball, Bag, Bad — sahi order kya hoga? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.a: Bag, Bad, Ball, Bat sahi order hai.
qas.hack: Alphabetical: g<d<l<t.

qas.q: Coding: MANGO = NBOQP, to APPLE = ? [UP Police Constable 2019]
qas.hack: +1 shift pattern.

qas.q: Logical sequence: 2, 4, 8, 16, ? — next kya hai? [UP Police Constable 2024]
Alphabetical order: Cat, Car, Cart, Cap — sahi sequence? [UP Police Constable 2024]
qas.a: Car, Cart, Cat, Cap sahi sequence hai.
qas.hack: Second letter compare: a<r<t.

qas.q: Coding pattern me har letter +2 shift ho raha hai. ABC = ? [UP Police Constable 2018]
qas.hack: +2 shift: A→C, B→D, C→E.
